description:
You are a DHIS2 implementer setting up metadata for the Malaria programme. Your goal is to create a 'Programme Area' dimension that allows analysis of data by 'Testing' vs 'Treatment'. Create a Data Element Group named 'Malaria Testing' containing at least two malaria testing data elements and a Data Element Group named 'Malaria Treatment' containing at least two malaria treatment data elements. Combine these into a Data Element Group Set named 'Malaria Programme Areas' configured as a data dimension. Using this configuration, create and save a Pivot Table favorite named 'Malaria by Programme Area 2023' showing the grouped data for Sierra Leone for the year 2023.

Login credentials: admin / district
